name: Reflex Sterilized Adult Cat Salmon & Anchovy Food 15kg
description: Reflex Adult cat food with salmon and anchovy is a complete and balanced premium cat food containing salmon protein, carefully formulated by a cat nutrionists to meet the daily nutritional needs of all adult cats. Ingredients: Dried animal protein, Cereals, Chicken fat, Dried Salmon Protein (20%), Dried Anchovy Protein (20%), Corn gluten, Dried sugar beet, Wheat bran, Fish flavour, Salmon oil, Anchovy oil, Vitamins and minerals, Flaxseed, Brewer's yeast, Salt, MOS (Mannan Oligosaccharide), Yucca schidigera, Taurine (3A370), Preservatives - antioxidants (E320 & E321). Minerals: Iron 200 mg/kg Iodine 1.5 mg/kg Copper 13 mg/kg Manganese 50 mg/kg Zinc 140 mg/kg Selenium 0.3 mg/kg Vitamins: Vitamin A 18000 IU/kg Vitamin D3 1500 IU/kg Vitamin E 200 mg/kg Vitamin C 400 mg/kg Vitamin K3 200 mg/kg Choline 3500 mg/kg Taurine 1500 mg/kg B3 (Niacin) Vitamin B2 Vitamin B1 B7 (Biotin) B9 (Folic Acid) Vitamin B12 Nutrient Components Crude Protein 32% Raw oil 15% Ash 8% Crude Cellulose (Fibre) 3%   Nutritious Supplements Vitamin A (3A672A) 18,000 IU/kg Vitamin D3 (3A671) 1,500 IU/kg Vitamin E (3A700) 200mg/kg Vitamin C (3A300) 200mg/kg Taurine (3A370) 1500mg/kg Vitamin K3 (3A710) 200mg/kg Choline(3A890) 3,500 mg/kg
